headline: Apple overhauls Screen Time and child controls.
summary: Apple announced a major redesign of its Screen Time parental control tool at WWDC 2026. New features aim to improve safeguarding for children using iPhone, iPad, and Mac devices. Parents will gain more control over settings in iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27.

headline: Amazon launches AI-generated custom merchandise.
summary: Amazon is expanding its print-on-demand service to include AI-generated designs. Shoppers can use text prompts with Alexa for Shopping to create custom images for products like T-shirts and hoodies. Designs can then be shared for others to purchase.

headline: Apple unveils iPadOS 27 at WWDC 2026.
summary: Apple announced new features for iPadOS 27 during its Worldwide Developers Conference. Optimizations include apps launching up to 30 percent faster by intelligently preloading information. Users will experience more responsive switching between multiple applications.

headline: Apple reveals new Siri AI and Apple Intelligence.
summary: Apple unveiled a new set of AI features and a smarter, more personalized Siri at WWDC. The company calls it an "entirely new version of Siri," boasting improved conversational capabilities. This update comes two years after Apple first outlined its plans for Apple Intelligence.

headline: Flashforge Adventurer 5M: Top entry-level 3D printer under $150.
summary: The Flashforge Adventurer 5M is highlighted as an excellent entry-level 3D printer. It offers high reliability and moddability for its price point. This deal makes a capable 3D printer available for less than $150.

headline: Gears of War: E-Day beta details revealed.
summary: The multiplayer beta for Gears of War: E-Day is scheduled to begin this August. Official start dates for the beta have been announced. Players can find information on how to secure early access.

headline: iBuyPower Element Pro gaming PC deal at $1,449.
summary: The iBuyPower Element Pro Ryzen X3D Edition gaming PC is now available for $1,449. It comes equipped with a powerful GeForce RTX 5070 GPU. This prebuilt system delivers outstanding performance for 1080p, 1440p, and even 4K gaming.

headline: Amazon's June Audible deal: 3 months for $0.99/month.
summary: Amazon is currently running a special June promotion for its Audible service. New subscribers can sign up to get three months of Audible for just $0.99 per month. It's an opportunity to catch up on audiobooks from popular authors like Rebecca Yarros and Brandon Sanderson.

headline: West Ham co-owner accused of sexual exploitation.
summary: Billionaire David Sullivan, co-owner of West Ham, faces accusations of abusing his power. Several women claim he demanded sex in exchange for featuring them in his newspapers. The allegations suggest a pattern of predatory and exploitative behavior.

headline: David Sullivan: Football boss, 'king of porn', alleged predator.
summary: A profile examines David Sullivan, known as a football boss and self-proclaimed 'king of porn.' He is now facing serious allegations of exploitative sexual behavior. The article delves into his history and the accusations against him.

headline: Sikh group demands inquiry into Henry Nowak death.
summary: The Sikh Federation has formally called for a government inquiry into the death of Henry Nowak. Dabinderjit Singh of the Sikh Federation has written to the government regarding this demand. The group seeks further investigation into the circumstances surrounding Nowak's death.

headline: New drug targets 'Ozempic butt' muscle loss.
summary: Experts reveal that up to a third of weight loss from obesity jabs, like Ozempic, can come from muscle. A new drug is being developed to counteract this muscle degradation. This innovation aims to address a significant side effect of popular weight loss medications.
